urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: 'People don't realise how at risk they are': A day with an ambulance service in a heatwave
latest.summary: Andrew, a 55-year-old man with asthma and a chronic lung condition, was struggling to breathe during a heatwave. Paramedics in South West England are responding to a surge in heat-related emergencies, including heat exhaustion and strokes.
latest.details: Andrew, a 55-year-old man with asthma and a chronic lung condition, was struggling to breathe during a heatwave. Paramedics in South West England are responding to a surge in heat-related emergencies, including heat exhaustion and strokes. The South Western Ambulance Service received over 4,000 emergency calls a day during the heatwave, significantly higher than the typical winter peak of 3,000 calls. The trust covers a vast area of 10,000 square miles, from Cornwall to Swindon. Health risks during heatwaves are often underestimated, especially for the elderly and those with chronic conditions. The paramedics noted that some individuals were unaware of how to stay cool, leading to unnecessary emergency calls.
latest.full_brief: Andrew, a 55-year-old man with asthma and a chronic lung condition, was struggling to breathe during a heatwave. Paramedics in South West England are responding to a surge in heat-related emergencies, including heat exhaustion and strokes. The South Western Ambulance Service received over 4,000 emergency calls a day during the heatwave, significantly higher than the typical winter peak of 3,000 calls. The trust covers a vast area of 10,000 square miles, from Cornwall to Swindon. Health risks during heatwaves are often underestimated, especially for the elderly and those with chronic conditions. The paramedics noted that some individuals were unaware of how to stay cool, leading to unnecessary emergency calls.

latest.title: UK begins trials of Ebola vaccine developed in just eight weeks
latest.summary: The UK has begun trials of a new Ebola vaccine developed in just eight weeks. The vaccine is the first of four under development to enter clinical trials.
latest.details: The UK has begun trials of a new Ebola vaccine developed in just eight weeks. The vaccine is the first of four under development to enter clinical trials. Volunteers are being recruited, with doses expected to be administered to healthy adults soon. The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo has resulted in 625 deaths and 1,792 confirmed cases. Researchers are also preparing for trials in Africa. The vaccine uses technology similar to that of the Oxford/AstraZeneca Covid vaccine.
latest.full_brief: The UK has begun trials of a new Ebola vaccine developed in just eight weeks. The vaccine is the first of four under development to enter clinical trials. Volunteers are being recruited, with doses expected to be administered to healthy adults soon. The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo has resulted in 625 deaths and 1,792 confirmed cases. Researchers are also preparing for trials in Africa. The vaccine uses technology similar to that of the Oxford/AstraZeneca Covid vaccine.

brief_methodology.pl: Jedna zasada: przeczytać dostępny tekst artykułu i streścić jego sens. Komentarz musi być ścisłym streszczeniem artykułu. Nie wolno przepisywać poleceń redakcyjnych typu „Skomentuj”, podpisów, źródeł, kategorii ani urwanych fragmentów.
brief_methodology.en: One rule: read the available article text and summarise its meaning. The comment must be a strict article summary. Do not copy editorial commands, bylines, source notes, categories or clipped fragments.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
